description.description: What the agent should do. Include enough detail for the task to be actionable.

origin_product.description: Where the task originated. Leave as 'user_created' unless you are mirroring another PostHog workflow.

repository.description: Optional GitHub repository in org/repo format, for example `posthog/posthog`. If omitted, the task is created without a repository. If provided, PostHog will use the project team's default GitHub integration.

run_immediately.description: Whether to start the task immediately after creating it. Defaults to true.

run_mode.description: How to run the task when `run_immediately` is true. Use 'background' unless the user explicitly wants an interactive run.

title.description: Optional task title. If omitted, PostHog will generate one from the description.
